753027214.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700

1047324239.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500

88100064.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600

23108150.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
23108150.jp_real: 今のは一たまりもなかったでしょうね
23108150.en_literal: That was quite a bit of fun, wasn't it?
23108150.english: They just don't compare to us, do they?

449232915.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800

943669889.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000

943669889.english: I knew I could count on you, Captain!

1037777124.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200

1037777124.english: You see right through their every move!

935199607.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
935199607.english: I know skill when I see it.

889712068.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500

889712068.en_literal: You're something else. Should I count on you again next time?
889712068.english: Well done! I could get used to support like that!

200717429.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700

200717429.english: Your pet ghosts are so cute!

1053962436.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
1053962436.jp_real: ランスロットさん、次も頼める？
1053962436.en_literal: Lancelot, can I count on you again?
1053962436.english: Lancelot! Ready for the next fight?

160175054.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900

592458449.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000

592458449.english: You really know how to make sparks fly!

114465484.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
114465484.jp_real: ありがとう、ジークフリートさん

30429305.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200

30429305.en_literal: Charlotta, I'm counting on you again!

689682409.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
689682409.jp_real: 今の連携、すごい速さだったわね。
689682409.en_literal: That link just now was incredibly fast.
689682409.english: We make for a speedy combination!

929636748.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
929636748.jp_real: 優雅な剣、見とれちゃいそうね。

929636748.english: Such dazzling skill! It's hard to look away!

311468559.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
311468559.jp_real: ツルノネヒビキ、コブシガウナル、なんてね。

311468559.english: The snap of the fist, the twang of the bowstring! Beautiful!

510461717.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
510461717.jp_real: エンゴ助かったわ、ゼタ。

170105333.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700

170105333.english: Get ready for the next one!

862901409.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900

349461555.jp_real: スマートな連携だったわね

963772590.english: Our fearless leader does it again!

926411704.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400

1056970972.english: I guess swordsmancers use cutting-edge magic!

852728103.english: Sometimes I feel like you're a bit too risky.

563057269.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700

563057269.en_literal: Looks like I can go even faster next time.
563057269.english: A little faster on the trigger if you would.

417118135.english: Having allies at your side really makes you feel more confident.

902159234.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900

151568362.en_literal: I still can't afford to be careless.

21716320.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300

19834389.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000

19834389.english: You really capitalized on that strike, Captain!

307800356.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200

307800356.en_literal: I need to prepare for the next prey.
307800356.english: Get ready for the next target!

611609131.english: They're really wracked with pain now!

546933124.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400

546933124.english: You really spelled their doom, Io!

197263401.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500

197263401.english: Perhaps we should change your name to Oi-gun!

546849792.en_literal: I'll sew through the thorns for you.
546849792.english: We're not out of the briars yet!

329266265.en_literal: So you're gonna beat an unconscious enemy with... unconsciousness? That's kinda mean.

55127553.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800

709910125.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
709910125.jp_real: この調子だと早々に獲物がいなくなっちゃいそうね
709910125.en_literal: If you keep this up, we'll run out of prey sooner than expected.

102913366.en_literal: With your flames, I wonder if I could even shoot down the moon with a magic sphere?
102913366.english: Hmm. I wonder if we could charge my arrows with your flames.

839581210.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100

839581210.english: Well, we certainly gave them a night to remember!

828618481.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200

828618481.en_literal: When I hear "paladin," I feel the weight of history. Not just any knight.
828618481.english: I bet your his-story as a holy knight is storied indeed!

94505947.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300

94505947.english: All sword work and no sword play makes for a sad fisherman!

556904963.english: For a butterfly, you're certainly a fierce ally!

50131487.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
50131487.jp_real: 次はもう少し踏み込んでもいいかしら
50131487.en_literal: Shall we go a little further next?
50131487.english: Strike fear into the hearts of our foes!

571103903.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
571103903.jp_real: やりーって感じで、やりだけに！
571103903.en_literal: It's all about the spear, you know. Just the spear.

447337264.en_literal: I can't afford to be bothered by an opponent like you! You're just asking for it!

1065321094.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800

1065321094.en_literal: You're surprised? Where on earth did you get that from?
1065321094.english: So, where do you pull all those objects from?

359380262.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
359380262.jp_real: イド？移動しましょう！イドだけに！
359380262.english: Id, let's not let our egos get in the way.

575038282.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100

575038282.en_literal: Using angel wings as arrowheads... I could make an amazing bow!
575038282.english: Angel feathers for fletching? Now those would be amazing arrows!

339433376.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
339433376.jp_real: シエテ、もっとペース上げてもいい？
339433376.en_literal: Seofon, can we pick up the pace a bit?
339433376.english: Seofon! How about we turn up the heat?

262405405.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
262405405.jp_real: うーん、同じ槍でもウーノとは全然違うのね。
262405405.en_literal: Huh, even with the same spear, it's completely different from Uno.
262405405.english: Despite both being spearmen, you and Anra couldn't be more different.

260039203.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500

260039203.en_literal: Magilafurina's strike is very flashy, isn't it?

539358067.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
539358067.jp_real: 今のよかったわ、ベアトリクス。

669195180.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
669195180.jp_real: フラメクで技を閃く！なんてのはどうかしら？
669195180.en_literal: Flashing with flair, my moves dazzle. How about that?
669195180.english: Always wondered how Flamewrath works? Then it struck me!

466868786.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
466868786.jp_real: 六竜のコク、すっごく強いのね。コクだけに。
466868786.en_literal: The Six Dragons' Dark... it's incredibly strong, you know. That's why it's Dark.
466868786.english: We really threaded the needle on that one, didn't we?

81773301.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
81773301.en_literal: Leave the next one to me!

589257209.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
589257209.english: Hehe, you weren't so bad yourself!

620949957.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
620949957.jp_real: 私の矢の軌道を予測できるなんて、ローランさんもさすがね。
620949957.en_literal: Predicting the trajectory of my arrows... You're something else, Rolan.
620949957.english: Don't act humble, Rolan. When your magic surpasses my own.

883945711.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
883945711.jp_real: 遠距離からの援護は任せて
883945711.en_literal: Leave the long-range support to me!

537406006.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
537406006.jp_real: あなたの矢を射るような鋭い意見、合わせやすいわ。
537406006.en_literal: Your arrows are like sharp opinions. Easy to coordinate with.
537406006.english: With you in the front line, it was easy!

603031145.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
603031145.jp_real: これくらいお安い御用よ
603031145.en_literal: Hehe, this is as cheap as it gets!

846666124.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
846666124.jp_real: 狙った的は外さないわ

785035133.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
785035133.en_literal: Phew! I'm glad I made it in time!

4990707.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
4990707.jp_real: ええ、どれだけ離れていても見逃しはしないわ。
4990707.en_literal: Huh? No matter how far apart we are, I won't miss it.
4990707.english: They can run, but they'll never escape me.

486566903.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900

486566903.en_literal: Thanks to you, Vane, creating the opening!
486566903.english: I'm nothing without a solid front line.

138415954.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
138415954.jp_real: ほんの立つところ撃てばいいのだから、いつもより楽ね。
138415954.en_literal: I'll just hit where the flames are. Easier than usual.
138415954.english: It's easier to find my target with such a bright beacon guiding me.

37399542.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
37399542.jp_real: ええもちろんよ、ジークフリートさん
37399542.english: I'm sure YOU would be just fine!

213295346.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
213295346.jp_real: えっ、これだけは誰にも負けない自信があるの。
213295346.en_literal: Huh? I'm confident I won't lose this to anyone.
213295346.english: Don't they? If there's one thing I do well, it's wield the bow.

339610087.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
339610087.jp_real: お礼なんていらないわ。仲間だもの。
339610087.en_literal: No need to thank me. We're comrades, after all.

69130391.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
69130391.english: I hope that's a good thing!

409806923.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
409806923.jp_real: ええ、これくらいなんてことないわ。
409806923.en_literal: Eh, this much? No big deal.
409806923.english: Of course. Think nothing of it.

721625298.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
721625298.jp_real: ふふふ、便利だと思わない？
721625298.en_literal: Hehe, don't you think it's convenient?

344616990.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
344616990.jp_real: 十点集ですもの、これくらいはね。
344616990.en_literal: It's a ten-point shot, so this much is nothing.
344616990.english: Heh, it's like you've never heard of the Eternals before.

844036284.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
844036284.jp_real: チャンスを逃さない！カリュードの一撃よ！
844036284.en_literal: I won't miss my chance. A strike from Calud.
844036284.english: A huntress never lets her prey escape.

825251145.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
825251145.jp_real: もう、手を抜いちゃダメよ、シエテ！
825251145.en_literal: Don't you dare pull your hand away, Seo!
825251145.english: No thanks to your slacking off.

937537196.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
937537196.jp_real: カリウドならこれくらいはできないとね
937537196.en_literal: If it's a Calidus, I should be able to handle this much.
937537196.english: A huntress must earn her keep, after all.

865229468.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
865229468.jp_real: ふふふ。それじゃあ、もう少し派手にやっちゃおうかしら。
865229468.en_literal: Hehehe... How about I make it a little more flashy?
865229468.english: You haven't even seen my best tricks yet!

889098460.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
889098460.jp_real: どれほど小さいスキも見逃さないわ
889098460.en_literal: I won't miss even the smallest of openings.
889098460.english: Can't sacrifice on opening! Even the tiny ones!

90820755.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
90820755.jp_real: どんな獲物も、食らいついて離さないわ。
90820755.en_literal: I'll never let go of any treasure.
90820755.english: Yep! There's no prey that can outrun these bad boys!

575348845.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
575348845.english: I like the way you think.

437098996.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
437098996.jp_real: 頼りにしてるんだから

14604871.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
14604871.english: And I can still keep going!

432635221.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
432635221.jp_real: 団長こそ、頼りにしてるんだから。

233735603.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
233735603.jp_real: ウフフフ、期待には精一杯応えないとね。
233735603.en_literal: Hehehe, I've got to live up to expectations, haven't I?

503902124.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
503902124.jp_real: あら、驚かせちゃったかしら？
503902124.english: An archer never reveals her secrets.

76012886.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
76012886.jp_real: ほらほら、よそ見しないの！
76012886.en_literal: Hey, hey, don't just stand there watching!
76012886.english: Let's just focus on the battle for now.

566089594.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
566089594.jp_real: いくらでも頼ってどうぞ
566089594.en_literal: Hehehe, feel free to rely on me as much as you'd like!
566089594.english: Rely on them all you'd like!

1033845700.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
1033845700.jp_real: 心を落ち着かせると狙いが安定するの
1033845700.en_literal: Calm your heart, and your aim will stabilize.
1033845700.english: It's all about the breath. Calm yourself and the rest will follow.

1011916229.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
1011916229.jp_real: あら、嬉しいこと言ってくれるじゃない
1011916229.en_literal: Oh, you're actually saying something nice.
1011916229.english: Aww, that was a lovely compliment!

512240688.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
512240688.jp_real: 好機は決して見逃さない！
512240688.en_literal: I'll never miss an opportunity like this!
512240688.english: We do what we must to turn the tide.

9815638.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
9815638.jp_real: 了解よ、パーシヴァルさん。

800079025.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
800079025.jp_real: あはは、実際に通す自信はあるわよ。
800079025.en_literal: I'm actually confident I can get through this.
800079025.english: What kind of archer would I be if I couldn't?

522393868.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
522393868.jp_real: うふふ、うまくいったわ
522393868.english: I saw you needed the support.

795863670.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
795863670.jp_real: 全空最強の名に偽りはないわ。
795863670.en_literal: There's no lie to the name of the strongest in the sky.
795863670.english: I am the best archer in the skies, you know!

987831815.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
987831815.jp_real: あなたの鼓動もとっても綺麗よ
987831815.en_literal: Your horns are really beautiful too.
987831815.english: Ooh, that was a very good try!

1033031175.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
1033031175.jp_real: 前だけ見てて。艶払いなら私が。
1033031175.en_literal: You just watch my back. I'll handle the cleanup.
1033031175.english: Yes! Your spear and my bow are invincible!

1040112175.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
1040112175.jp_real: バザラガさんのおおがまも、ねらった獲物は逃がさない。でしょ？
1040112175.en_literal: Even your big mouth, Vaseraga, won't let your prey escape, right?
1040112175.english: Likewise. I would hate to see what you can do with that scythe up close.

243704139.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
243704139.jp_real: えっ、後ろは任せて！イド！
243704139.en_literal: Huh? Leave the back to me, Id!

942716352.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
942716352.jp_real: えっ！十天衆の力をお見せするわ！
942716352.en_literal: Huh? I'll show you the power of the Ten Stars!
942716352.english: Let's see if they can stand up to an eternal!

403870658.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
403870658.jp_real: 了解。全員はよろしくね。

77915914.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
77915914.jp_real: 本気で来い！って来い！あ、つまり本気で獲りになるってこと？
77915914.en_literal: Come at me for real. For real? So you're saying you're gonna go all out?
77915914.english: Punch the front line? The punchline! You must be good at landing jabs!

997892190.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
997892190.jp_real: その表現、とってもおしゃれね。
997892190.english: I love the way you word things. Always so fancy.

635814412.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
635814412.jp_real: 仲間だもの、当然でしょ？

936163081.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
936163081.jp_real: カリウド同士、だからこそかしら
936163081.en_literal: I'm not sure if it's because we're fellow exiles...
936163081.english: Even lone wolves hunt in a pack from time to time.

611265819.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
611265819.jp_real: ああ、上手！うん、なんだか悔しい…
611265819.en_literal: You're too good... I'm kinda frustrated...
611265819.english: Ooh, good one! But, uh, feels like you've taken my job!

486866651.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
486866651.en_literal: I hope I was of some help.

466230886.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
466230886.jp_real: ほら、ぼーっとしてないで、先を急ぎましょ！
466230886.en_literal: Hey, don't space out. Let's hurry ahead.
466230886.english: Hello, Skyster Rolan! There are more battles to win!

64521950.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0000
64521950.jp_real: えっ、獲物は絶対逃がさないわ。
64521950.en_literal: Huh? I'm definitely not letting this prey get away!

126075999.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
126075999.jp_real: うまくいったわね、カタリナさん

467822825.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
467822825.jp_real: カリウドに死角はないわ
467822825.en_literal: Hehe, you're no match for my skill!
467822825.english: What kind of huntress would I be otherwise?

1022786907.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
1022786907.jp_real: ええ、きっとできるわ。私も応援するわね。
1022786907.en_literal: Eh, I'm sure you can do it! I'll be cheering you on too!
1022786907.english: If anyone can do it, it's you. Would you like some tips?

272967963.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
272967963.jp_real: そう見える？そうかもね
272967963.en_literal: You think so? Hehe, maybe you're right.
272967963.english: Huh. You noticed? One of my specialties.

701893492.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
701893492.jp_real: よしよし、よくがんばったわね。

546463786.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
546463786.jp_real: 了解よ、ランスロットさん。

289432736.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
289432736.english: Not before I shoot them between the eyes!

986215489.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
986215489.jp_real: 分かってる！すでに予測してるわ！
986215489.en_literal: I know. I've already predicted it.

118210190.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
118210190.jp_real: うーん、大きくはどうかな？
118210190.en_literal: Hmm, I'm not sure about the big one...
118210190.english: Charlotta, we already look up to you.

189997741.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
189997741.en_literal: Hehehe... Do I look like it?

320862874.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
320862874.jp_real: その刃に込められた気迫、本当に彼にそっくりね。
320862874.en_literal: The will poured into that blade... it's really just like him.
320862874.english: You know, your quiet power reminds me a lot of Ayato.

121407500.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
121407500.jp_real: わかったわ、ガンダゴウザさん。

927870452.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
927870452.jp_real: カリウドにカリッ…か…？もしかしてこれって…
927870452.en_literal: I'm not sure what this is...
927870452.english: Oh, oh! Is it prayers? You're so clever, Zeta!

301314879.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
301314879.jp_real: ええ、いいわ。次も合わせて見せる。
301314879.en_literal: Yeah, I'm good. Let's show 'em what we've got next!
301314879.english: Trust me, the fight never leaves me.

791216212.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
791216212.jp_real: えっ、こうかな？とりあえず！

476717072.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
476717072.jp_real: あら、それはお互いさまでしょ？
476717072.en_literal: Huh? That's what you get for being so reckless.
476717072.english: I think that goes both ways.

501434935.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
501434935.jp_real: そうね。反省点はあとで相談しましょう。
501434935.en_literal: Sure thing! Let's talk about the points later.
501434935.english: Right, and I would give your attitude a solid F.

835773421.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
835773421.jp_real: ほら、ぼーっとしないの？
835773421.english: Snap out of it! We're still busy here!

727964122.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
727964122.jp_real: ウフフフ。目の付け所がいいでしょ？
727964122.en_literal: Heh heh... I've got a good eye for detail, don't I?
727964122.english: Hehe, I always make my point, don't I?

184144069.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
184144069.jp_real: え？ごめん、よく聞こえなかった。もう一回言ってもらえる？
184144069.en_literal: Huh? Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you say that again?
184144069.english: Uh... well, that's not bad for a first try.

565741730.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
565741730.en_literal: Leave the next horde to me!
565741730.english: Even after all the puns I've made...

1005703767.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
1005703767.jp_real: ありがとう。でももっと研ぎ澄ましていくわ。
1005703767.en_literal: Thank you. But I'll keep sharpening myself.
1005703767.english: Thank you. But I think I still have room to grow.

296629539.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
296629539.jp_real: リクエストされるとなんだか恥ずかしいな
296629539.english: Oh, uh... when you put me on the spot like that, I can't think of any.

318235249.label: PL2300_vo_SP_link_time_start
318235249.en_literal: Then I'll throw everything at you!
318235249.english: Ha! Who's ready to finish them?
